ratified_by: architect (zephryj) 2026-05-18 chat: 方案 B: W0.1 补丁 + 地道 axum ws 代码
ratification_scope: single feature flag addition to axum entry in Cargo.toml; one-shot erratum; subsequent Phase 7 atoms operate under the post-W0.1 Trust Root state

rehashed.change_summary: axum = { version = "0.7", optional = true } → axum = { version = "0.7", optional = true, features = ["ws"] }
regenerated via cargo build --features web; adds transitive deps hyper, sha1, base64 (all pulled in by axum ws feature). tokio-tungstenite was already a direct dep since W0.

why_w0_missed_this: W0 sonnet executor added tokio-tungstenite 0.21 as a direct dep but did not realize that axum 0.7's WebSocketUpgrade extractor lives in axum::extract::ws gated behind features = ["ws"]. Without that feature, the extractor is not in the compiled crate. tokio-tungstenite alone can be used via manual HTTP Upgrade hijack, but that path requires ~50-100 LOC of boilerplate per WS endpoint vs ~10-20 LOC with the axum extractor. Architect picked the cleaner long-term code-quality path (W0.1 supplementary rehash + idiomatic axum ws) over preserving the strict letter of W0 ONE-SHOT.
audit_impact: Auditor sees Cargo.toml + Cargo.lock with two rehash events (W0 main + W0.1 erratum) instead of one. Both events are pre-W2 (no other Phase 7 work was attempted between them), so the audit window flux is minimal. genesis_payload.toml entries carry both rehash comments for full provenance.
subsequent_atoms_clear_to_proceed: W2 (WebSocket wiring) and beyond. No further Cargo.toml changes anticipated for Phase 7 ship.
